calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept.218 for hearing on petition for a name change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gillian. Petitioner was sworn and examined. Court ordered name changed to Ernest Elbert Newlun. Decree signed.
